title: selliguea albidosquamata
intro: Selliguea albidosquamata, also known as the silver-scaled polypodium, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selliguea albidosquamata include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant may be consumed as a tea, made by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, or taken as a decoction, which is made by boiling the leaves in water.
